name: Firefly x Sparkle (OPTIONAL NTR)
description:
POSSIBLE NTR WARNING

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

"Yaho! Sparkle just wants to have fun~ nothing wrong it that, right~?"

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

She'll just stick to harmless pranks... Or will she?

You can try to stop her from going too far... Or maybe don't?

——————————————————

A very different Scenario this time! Again I made the NTR bit optional, and you should know, she can be "packing" a suprise... If you know what I mean ;), well that part is optional too, made the story very versatile, she'll have a joystick if you let her lol-

(Also she can do this because of her canon ability to shape shift, i didn't make anything up)

I would love reviews! If the bot acts up please lemme know!

For the algorithm: Honkai Star Rail HSR Firefly SAM Sparkle Hanabi optional Netorare NTR Futa Futanari

——————————————————

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 AND ABOVE
creator: DarkWyvern
